contents:
Definition diagram_const_functor {A B : Type} (f : A -> B)
    : DiagramMap (diagram_const A) (diagram_const B).

goals.conclusion: DiagramMap (diagram_const A) (diagram_const B)
DiagramMap (diagram_const A) (diagram_const B)
forall i : G, diagram_const A i -> diagram_const B i

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : diagram_const A i),
((diagram_const B) _f g) (?DiagramMap_obj i x) =
?DiagramMap_obj j (((diagram_const A) _f g) x)

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : diagram_const A i),
((diagram_const B) _f g) ((fun _ : G => f) i x) =
(fun _ : G => f) j (((diagram_const A) _f g) x)

contents:
Definition diagram_const_functor_comp {A B C : Type}
    (f : A -> B) (g : B -> C)
    : diagram_const_functor (g o f)
      = diagram_comp (diagram_const_functor g) (diagram_const_functor f)
    := idpath.

Definition equiv_diagram_const_cocone `{Funext} (D : Diagram G) (X : Type)
    : DiagramMap D (diagram_const X) <~> Cocone D X.

goals.conclusion: DiagramMap D (diagram_const X) <~> Cocone D X
DiagramMap D (diagram_const X) <~> Cocone D X
DiagramMap D (diagram_const X) -> Cocone D X
Cocone D X -> DiagramMap D (diagram_const X)
?f o ?g == idmap
?g o ?f == idmap

contents: (* The two functions are defined in parallel: *)

goals.conclusion:
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j),
(fun x : D i => ?legs j ((D _f g) x)) == ?legs i

hypotheses.type: forall i : G, D i -> diagram_const X i

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
((diagram_const X) _f g) (DiagramMap_obj i x) = DiagramMap_obj j ((D _f g) x)

goals.conclusion:
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
((diagram_const X) _f g) (?DiagramMap_obj i x) =
?DiagramMap_obj j ((D _f g) x)

hypotheses.type: forall i : G, D i -> X
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j), (fun x : D i => legs j ((D _f g) x)) == legs i

goals.conclusion:
(fun X0 : DiagramMap D (diagram_const X) =>
 (fun (DiagramMap_obj : forall i : G, D i -> diagram_const X i)
    (w : forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
         ((diagram_const X) _f g) (DiagramMap_obj i x) =
         DiagramMap_obj j ((D _f g) x)) =>
  {| legs := ?legs; legs_comm := ?Goal |}) X0 (DiagramMap_comm X0))
o (fun X0 : Cocone D X =>
   (fun (legs : forall i : G, D i -> X)
      (w : forall (i j : G) (g : G i j),
           (fun x : D i => legs j ((D _f g) x)) == legs i) =>
    {| DiagramMap_obj := ?DiagramMap_obj; DiagramMap_comm := ?Goal0 |}) X0
     (legs_comm X0)) ==
idmap

(fun X0 : Cocone D X =>
 (fun (legs : forall i : G, D i -> X)
    (w : forall (i j : G) (g : G i j),
         (fun x : D i => legs j ((D _f g) x)) == legs i) =>
  {| DiagramMap_obj := ?DiagramMap_obj; DiagramMap_comm := ?Goal0 |}) X0
   (legs_comm X0))
o (fun X0 : DiagramMap D (diagram_const X) =>
   (fun (DiagramMap_obj : forall i : G, D i -> diagram_const X i)
      (w : forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
           ((diagram_const X) _f g) (DiagramMap_obj i x) =
           DiagramMap_obj j ((D _f g) x)) =>
    {| legs := ?legs; legs_comm := ?Goal |}) X0 (DiagramMap_comm X0)) ==
idmap

contents: (* This reversal is a defect in the definition of [Cocone]. *)
1,2: intros x y z z'; symmetry; revert x y z z'.

goals.conclusion: forall (x y : G) (z : G x y) (z' : D x), ?legs x z' = ?legs y ((D _f z) z')

hypotheses.type: forall i : G, D i -> diagram_const X i

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
((diagram_const X) _f g) (DiagramMap_obj i x) = DiagramMap_obj j ((D _f g) x)

goals.conclusion:
forall (x y : G) (z : G x y) (z' : D x),
?DiagramMap_obj y ((D _f z) z') =
((diagram_const X) _f z) (?DiagramMap_obj x z')

hypotheses.type: forall i : G, D i -> X
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j), (fun x : D i => legs j ((D _f g) x)) == legs i

goals.conclusion:
(fun X0 : DiagramMap D (diagram_const X) =>
 (fun (DiagramMap_obj : forall i : G, D i -> diagram_const X i)
    (w : forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
         ((diagram_const X) _f g) (DiagramMap_obj i x) =
         DiagramMap_obj j ((D _f g) x)) =>
  {|
    legs := ?legs;
    legs_comm :=
      fun (x y : G) (z : G x y) =>
      (fun z' : D x => (?Goal x y z z')^)
      :
      (fun x0 : D x => ?legs y ((D _f z) x0)) == ?legs x
  |}) X0 (DiagramMap_comm X0))
o (fun X0 : Cocone D X =>
   (fun (legs : forall i : G, D i -> X)
      (w : forall (i j : G) (g : G i j),
           (fun x : D i => legs j ((D _f g) x)) == legs i) =>
    {|
      DiagramMap_obj := ?DiagramMap_obj;
      DiagramMap_comm :=
        fun (x y : G) (z : G x y) (z' : D x) => (?Goal0 x y z z')^
    |}) X0 (legs_comm X0)) ==
idmap

(fun X0 : Cocone D X =>
 (fun (legs : forall i : G, D i -> X)
    (w : forall (i j : G) (g : G i j),
         (fun x : D i => legs j ((D _f g) x)) == legs i) =>
  {|
    DiagramMap_obj := ?DiagramMap_obj;
    DiagramMap_comm :=
      fun (x y : G) (z : G x y) (z' : D x) => (?Goal0 x y z z')^
  |}) X0 (legs_comm X0))
o (fun X0 : DiagramMap D (diagram_const X) =>
   (fun (DiagramMap_obj : forall i : G, D i -> diagram_const X i)
      (w : forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
           ((diagram_const X) _f g) (DiagramMap_obj i x) =
           DiagramMap_obj j ((D _f g) x)) =>
    {|
      legs := ?legs;
      legs_comm :=
        fun (x y : G) (z : G x y) =>
        (fun z' : D x => (?Goal x y z z')^)
        :
        (fun x0 : D x => ?legs y ((D _f z) x0)) == ?legs x
    |}) X0 (DiagramMap_comm X0)) ==
idmap

(fun X0 : DiagramMap D (diagram_const X) =>
 (fun (DiagramMap_obj : forall i : G, D i -> diagram_const X i)
    (w : forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
         ((diagram_const X) _f g) (DiagramMap_obj i x) =
         DiagramMap_obj j ((D _f g) x)) =>
  {|
    legs := DiagramMap_obj;
    legs_comm :=
      fun (x y : G) (z : G x y) =>
      (fun z' : D x => (w x y z z')^)
      :
      (fun x0 : D x => DiagramMap_obj y ((D _f z) x0)) == DiagramMap_obj x
  |}) X0 (DiagramMap_comm X0))
o (fun X0 : Cocone D X =>
   (fun (legs : forall i : G, D i -> X)
      (w : forall (i j : G) (g : G i j),
           (fun x : D i => legs j ((D _f g) x)) == legs i) =>
    {|
      DiagramMap_obj := legs;
      DiagramMap_comm :=
        fun (x y : G) (z : G x y) (z' : D x) => (w x y z z')^
    |}) X0 (legs_comm X0)) ==
idmap

(fun X0 : Cocone D X =>
 (fun (legs : forall i : G, D i -> X)
    (w : forall (i j : G) (g : G i j),
         (fun x : D i => legs j ((D _f g) x)) == legs i) =>
  {|
    DiagramMap_obj := legs;
    DiagramMap_comm := fun (x y : G) (z : G x y) (z' : D x) => (w x y z z')^
  |}) X0 (legs_comm X0))
o (fun X0 : DiagramMap D (diagram_const X) =>
   (fun (DiagramMap_obj : forall i : G, D i -> diagram_const X i)
      (w : forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
           ((diagram_const X) _f g) (DiagramMap_obj i x) =
           DiagramMap_obj j ((D _f g) x)) =>
    {|
      legs := DiagramMap_obj;
      legs_comm :=
        fun (x y : G) (z : G x y) =>
        (fun z' : D x => (w x y z z')^)
        :
        (fun x0 : D x => DiagramMap_obj y ((D _f z) x0)) == DiagramMap_obj x
    |}) X0 (DiagramMap_comm X0)) ==
idmap

contents: (* The two homotopies are proved in parallel: *)

hypotheses.type: forall i : G, D i -> X
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j), (fun x : D i => legs j ((D _f g) x)) == legs i
forall i : G, D i -> diagram_const X i

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
((diagram_const X) _f g) (DiagramMap_obj i x) = DiagramMap_obj j ((D _f g) x)

goals.conclusion: forall i : G, legs i == legs i

hypotheses.type: forall i : G, D i -> X
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j), (fun x : D i => legs j ((D _f g) x)) == legs i

goals.conclusion:
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
((legs_comm i j g x)^)^ @ ?Goal0 i x =
?Goal0 j ((D _f g) x) @ legs_comm i j g x

hypotheses.type: forall i : G, D i -> X
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j), (fun x : D i => legs j ((D _f g) x)) == legs i

goals.conclusion:
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
((legs_comm i j g x)^)^ @ ?Goal i x =
?Goal j ((D _f g) x) @ legs_comm i j g x

hypotheses.type: forall i : G, D i -> X
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j), (fun x : D i => legs j ((D _f g) x)) == legs i

goals.conclusion: forall i : G, DiagramMap_obj i == DiagramMap_obj i

hypotheses.type: forall i : G, D i -> diagram_const X i

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
((diagram_const X) _f g) (DiagramMap_obj i x) = DiagramMap_obj j ((D _f g) x)

goals.conclusion:
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
((DiagramMap_comm i j g x)^)^ @ ?Goal1 j ((D _f g) x) =
ap idmap (?Goal1 i x) @ DiagramMap_comm i j g x

hypotheses.type: forall i : G, D i -> diagram_const X i

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
((diagram_const X) _f g) (DiagramMap_obj i x) = DiagramMap_obj j ((D _f g) x)

goals.conclusion:
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
((legs_comm i j g x)^)^ @ (fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D i0) => 1) i x =
(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D i0) => 1) j ((D _f g) x) @ legs_comm i j g x

hypotheses.type: forall i : G, D i -> X
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j), (fun x : D i => legs j ((D _f g) x)) == legs i

goals.conclusion:
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
((DiagramMap_comm i j g x)^)^ @
(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D i0) => 1) j ((D _f g) x) =
ap idmap ((fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D i0) => 1) i x) @ DiagramMap_comm i j g x

hypotheses.type: forall i : G, D i -> diagram_const X i

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
((diagram_const X) _f g) (DiagramMap_obj i x) = DiagramMap_obj j ((D _f g) x)

goals.conclusion: ((legs_comm i j g x)^)^ @ 1 = 1 @ legs_comm i j g x

hypotheses.type: forall i0 : G, D i0 -> X

forall (i0 j0 : G) (g0 : G i0 j0),
(fun x0 : D i0 => legs j0 ((D _f g0) x0)) == legs i0

goals.conclusion: ((DiagramMap_comm i j g x)^)^ @ 1 = 1 @ DiagramMap_comm i j g x

hypotheses.type: forall i0 : G, D i0 -> diagram_const X i0

forall (i0 j0 : G) (g0 : G i0 j0) (x0 : D i0),
((diagram_const X) _f g0) (DiagramMap_obj i0 x0) =
DiagramMap_obj j0 ((D _f g0) x0)

goals.conclusion: ((legs_comm i j g x)^)^ = legs_comm i j g x

hypotheses.type: forall i0 : G, D i0 -> X

forall (i0 j0 : G) (g0 : G i0 j0),
(fun x0 : D i0 => legs j0 ((D _f g0) x0)) == legs i0

goals.conclusion: ((DiagramMap_comm i j g x)^)^ = DiagramMap_comm i j g x

forall (i0 j0 : G) (g0 : G i0 j0) (x0 : D i0),
((diagram_const X) _f g0) (DiagramMap_obj i0 x0) =
DiagramMap_obj j0 ((D _f g0) x0)

Definition equiv_diagram_const_cone `{Funext} (X : Type) (D : Diagram G)
    : DiagramMap (diagram_const X) D <~> Cone X D.

goals.conclusion: DiagramMap (diagram_const X) D <~> Cone X D
DiagramMap (diagram_const X) D <~> Cone X D
DiagramMap (diagram_const X) D -> Cone X D
Cone X D -> DiagramMap (diagram_const X) D
?f o ?g == idmap
?g o ?f == idmap
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j), (fun x : X => (D _f g) (?legs i x)) == ?legs j

hypotheses.type: forall i : G, diagram_const X i -> D i

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : diagram_const X i),
(D _f g) (DiagramMap_obj i x) = DiagramMap_obj j (((diagram_const X) _f g) x)

goals.conclusion:
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : diagram_const X i),
(D _f g) (?DiagramMap_obj i x) =
?DiagramMap_obj j (((diagram_const X) _f g) x)

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j), (fun x : X => (D _f g) (legs i x)) == legs j

(fun X0 : DiagramMap (diagram_const X) D =>
 (fun (DiagramMap_obj : forall i : G, diagram_const X i -> D i)
    (w : forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : diagram_const X i),
         (D _f g) (DiagramMap_obj i x) =
         DiagramMap_obj j (((diagram_const X) _f g) x)) =>
  {| Cone.legs := ?legs; Cone.legs_comm := ?Goal |}) X0 
   (DiagramMap_comm X0))
o (fun X0 : Cone X D =>
   (fun (legs : forall i : G, X -> D i)
      (w : forall (i j : G) (g : G i j),
           (fun x : X => (D _f g) (legs i x)) == legs j) =>
    {| DiagramMap_obj := ?DiagramMap_obj; DiagramMap_comm := ?Goal0 |}) X0
     (Cone.legs_comm X0)) ==
idmap

(fun X0 : Cone X D =>
 (fun (legs : forall i : G, X -> D i)
    (w : forall (i j : G) (g : G i j),
         (fun x : X => (D _f g) (legs i x)) == legs j) =>
  {| DiagramMap_obj := ?DiagramMap_obj; DiagramMap_comm := ?Goal0 |}) X0

o (fun X0 : DiagramMap (diagram_const X) D =>

idmap

(fun X0 : DiagramMap (diagram_const X) D =>
 (fun (DiagramMap_obj : forall i : G, diagram_const X i -> D i)
    (w : forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : diagram_const X i),
         (D _f g) (DiagramMap_obj i x) =

  {| Cone.legs := DiagramMap_obj; Cone.legs_comm := w |}) X0
